description_long: This is a large, rectangular green dumpster with a split, ribbed metal lid on top, designed for waste collection in urban environments. The body is made of painted metal panels, with a black horizontal band running around the upper section, possibly for reinforcement or aesthetic contrast. The lid is composed of two hinged sections, each with visible ridges for structural strength, and appears to be made of galvanized steel. There are several black garbage bags, plastic bottles, and a bowl placed around the dumpster, indicating its use for waste disposal. No wheels are visible, suggesting it is a stationary unit, and there are no prominent handles on the sides or front. The overall construction is robust, suitable for outdoor placement in areas such as alleys, parking lots, or behind commercial buildings.
description: A large green metal dumpster with a split ribbed metal lid, black accent band, and no visible wheels or handles, surrounded by garbage bags and bottles.
description_view_0: The dumpster is seen from an angle, showing the sloped split lid, black accent band, and some waste items including bottles and a bowl nearby.
description_view_1: Front view reveals the full width of the split ribbed lid, the green body, and a row of garbage bags and bottles lined up in front.
description_view_2: Side view highlights the black accent band, the sloped lid, and several garbage bags placed adjacent to the dumpster.
description_view_3: Rear view shows a plain green panel with no lid access, a bowl to the side, and a couple of garbage bags nearby.
attribute_lid_type: split, ribbed, hinged metal lid with two sections, galvanized steel, no visible locking mechanism
